ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who created the track */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album the track belongs to */,
  "streams" INTEGER /* Number of streams for the track */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the track */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the track */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Length of the track in seconds */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the track */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the track */,
  "mood" TEXT /* Mood or atmosphere of the track */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the track by users */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the track contains explicit content */,
  "isrc" TEXT /* International Standard Recording Code of the track */,
  "popularity" REAL /* Popularity of the track based on streaming metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of music the artist creates */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the artist's image */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the artist */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Death date of the artist (if applicable) */,
  "birth_place" TEXT /* Birthplace of the artist */,
  "website" TEXT /* Artist's official website */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Artist's social media handles */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Awards won by the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who created the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the album's cover art */,
  "label" TEXT /* Record label that released the album */,
  "producer" TEXT /* Producer of the album */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the album */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the album by users */,
  "total_tracks" INTEGER /* Total number of tracks in the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* User's full name */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* User's date of birth */,
  "country" TEXT /* User's country of residence */,
  "subscription_plan" TEXT /* User's current subscription plan */,
  "playback_history" TEXT /* User's playback history (e.g., tracks played, albums played) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the playlist's cover art */,
  "tracks_count" INTEGER /* Number of tracks in the playlist */,
  "public" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the playlist is public or private */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags or keywords for the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_tracks" (
  "playlist_track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist track */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist the track was added to */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track added to the playlist */,
  "add_date" TEXT /* Date the track was added to the playlist */,
  "added_by" TEXT /* User who added the track to the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_tracks_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_tracks_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_follows" (
  "user_follow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user follow */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who followed the artist */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist followed by the user */,
  "follow_date" TEXT /* Date the user followed the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_follow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_follows_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_follows_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)
